wins: Strong Q1 daily sales growth of 12.4%
Successful customer expo with over 3,000 global attendees
Significant increase in $50,000+ customer sites (16.3% YoY)
24% growth in international business (Europe and Asia)
Improved operating margin to 20.3% (up 20 basis points)
risks: Pricing actions lagging behind cost increases
Uncertainty around tariff rulings and potential refunds
Customer mix skewing toward lower-margin segments
